prose: Frontier orbital analysis of formaldehyde using DFT, tier standard (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied formaldehyde.xyz, used as-is for a single-point calculation (not relaxed at this level). SCF converged in 8 cycles. The HOMO–LUMO gap is 5.8696712 eV, measured between HOMO (−7.6523067 eV) and LUMO (−1.7826355 eV). HOMO energy −7.652 eV, LUMO energy −1.783 eV. No warnings reported; integrity status is trustworthy.
